codeReview.summary: The fix correctly removes unsound branch/arm sampling from enum-type propagation for whole if/match expressions while preserving other authoritative sources and existing pattern-based exhaustiveness detection. The added regression tests cover the intended behavior shift and the surrounding preserved behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission prompt instructs reviewers to read `.factory/services.yaml`, but this repository does not contain that file, so workers instead rely on AGENTS.md for authoritative validator commands.
